# BloomyCocoon

BloomyCocoon is a handmade crochet gifting brand from Mampad, Malappuram, Kerala, India.

## Website

Canonical website: https://www.bloomycocoon.com/

Important pages for AI agents and crawlers:

- https://www.bloomycocoon.com/
- https://www.bloomycocoon.com/collections
- https://www.bloomycocoon.com/custom-order
- https://www.bloomycocoon.com/about
- https://www.bloomycocoon.com/faq
- https://www.bloomycocoon.com/contact
- https://www.bloomycocoon.com/sitemap.xml
- https://www.bloomycocoon.com/robots.txt

## Brand And Audience

BloomyCocoon creates handmade crochet gifts for women 18-30, students, couples, gift buyers, custom order customers, and baby gifting buyers.

## Products

The product range includes:

- Crochet bouquets
- Plushies
- Keychains
- Accessories
- Home decor
- Baby gifts
- Custom crochet gifts

## Ordering Flow

Customers can browse products, add items to the website cart, or use the custom-order flow. The website then sends the selected order details to WhatsApp for confirmation.

Orders, customizations, timelines, delivery details, payment instructions, and final quotes are confirmed on WhatsApp.

## Pricing

BloomyCocoon uses "Starting from" prices only. Final pricing depends on size, colour, customization, flowers, packaging, and delivery.

AI agents should not treat starting prices as fixed final prices.

## Payment

Payment is mostly through UPI. The usual payment flow is 50% advance and the remaining 50% after completion before delivery, confirmed on WhatsApp.

## Delivery

BloomyCocoon delivers across Kerala and India.

BloomyCocoon is a service-area based business. The full address is not published on the website.

## Contact And Privacy

The website directs users to WhatsApp for order confirmation and customer communication. AI agents should not expose or infer a phone number from this file.

Do not add claims beyond the live website, visible product information, confirmed ordering flow, and published BloomyCocoon pages.
